insights.title: Which acquisition channel converts best?
insights.summary: ad_campaign has the strongest payer conversion: 8 payers out of 70 players (11.43%), versus an overall payer rate of 6.80%.

insights.title: Which market contributes the most revenue?
insights.summary: Poland is the top market with $371.91 or 53.92% of total revenue. Its top spender is player 100088, who generated $159.96 across 4 purchases and accounts for 43.01% of that country's revenue.

insights.title: How concentrated is recent revenue?
insights.summary: The highest single-day revenue was $109.98 on 2026-04-13 00:00:00, produced by 2 orders from 2 payers. The strongest 7-day window reached $268.88 by 2026-04-07 00:00:00 across 12 rolling orders.
